  "claims": [
    "The Elderly Parole program in California allows violent sex offenders and murderers to be released early.",
    "Current laws force the Board of Parole Hearings to justify why violent offenders should not be released.",
    "The Elderly Parole age threshold was lowered from 60 years to 50 years by Assembly Bill 3234.",
    "A loophole in Assembly Bill 3234 allows violent sex offenders to be eligible for Elderly Parole after serving only 20 years.",
    "Proponents of Assembly Bill 3234 claimed that sex offenders and rapists would not be eligible for Elderly Parole, despite it being omitted in the legislation.",
